name: GLM-5-Turbo
tagline: High-throughput GLM-5 variant optimised for agent tasks with improved tool integration and instruction decomposition.
metaDescription: GLM-5-Turbo (Z.ai (Zhipu / GLM)), released 2026-03-15 — part of the GLM Turbo line. High-throughput GLM-5 variant optimised for agent tasks with improved tool…
overview: GLM-5-Turbo is a large language model from Z.ai (Zhipu / GLM), part of the GLM Turbo line. Released 2026-03-15. API-served, throughput-optimised variants of the GLM-5 flagship for high-volume agent tasks.
What's notable in this version: High-throughput GLM-5 variant optimised for agent tasks with improved tool integration and instruction decomposition.
